LanguageData.FCP_Item_Stealthboy_3001A.description:
A portable stealth device from before the war. Generates a modulating field that renders the user nearly invisible for a brief time. Early model with short operational duration.
Can be addictive with regular use.
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Stealthboy_3001A.label: Stealthboy 3001A
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Stealthboy_3001B.description:
An improved portable stealth device from before the war. More efficient than the 3001A model, providing significantly longer invisibility duration.
Can be addictive with regular use.
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Stealthboy_3001B.label: Stealthboy 3001B
